SHENZ PAGE 13
SHENZHEN TIMA

# 面部衰老的特征

面部衰老的特征包括：
- 皮下物質的流失
- 骨骼吸收
- 弹性丧失
- 外观上出现骨骼、血管、皱纹

--- Page 14
SHENZHEN TIMA

# 面部衰老的特征

面部衰老 is a complex natural process characterized by:
- Loss of subcutaneous substances
- Bone resorption
- Postural wrinkles (e.g., forehead lines)
- Dynamic wrinkles (e.g., frown lines, crow's feet)
- Gravitational wrinkles (e.g., sagging due to gravity)
